title: External APIs Reference
description: Niamoto talks to external services in several parts of the product rather than through a single central gateway.
html:
External APIs Reference

Niamoto talks to external services in several parts of the product rather than through a single central gateway.

Main integration areas

  • Taxonomy and spatial enrichment loaders under src/niamoto/core/plugins/loaders/
  • Deployment integrations under src/niamoto/core/plugins/deployers/
  • Desktop preview and GUI backend routes under src/niamoto/gui/api/

Related docs

  • gui-preview-api.md: desktop-side preview contract
  • api-export-guide.md: machine-readable outputs
  • api/modules.rst: autogenerated package reference
